GlobalVariables.StudyDescription: This file contains the metadata, events, and data for REDCap project "NAVIS Hantavirus".
GlobalVariables.redcap:MissingDataCodes: NI, No information UNK, Unknown NASK, Not asked NA, Not applicable

ItemGroupDef.Name: EXPOSURE TO CONFIRMED OR SUSPECTED CASE ON BOARD
CO-MORBIDITIES AND RISK FACTORS: Existing prior to this current illness and is ongoing
MEDICATION PRIOR TO THIS ADMISSION / PRESENTATION
SYMPTOMS: Indicate if experienced between 00:00 to 24:00 on day of assessment.
SIGNS: Record the clinical findings observed between 00:00 and 24:00 on the day of assessment
VITAL SIGNS & ASSESSMENTS: Record the value furthest from normal range between 00:00 to 24:00 on day of assessment.
TREATMENTS & INTERVENTIONS: Record all interventions given between 00:00 to 24:00 on day of assessment.
RESPIRATORY SUPPORT: Record all respiratory interventions given between 00:00 to 24:00 on day of assessment.
ADVANCED CARE INTERVENTIONS: Record all advanced care interventions given between 00:00 to 24:00 on day of assessment.
LABORATORY: HEMATOLOGY & BIOCHEMISTRY - RECORD THE VALUE FURTHEST FROM THE NORMAL RANGE BETWEEN 00:00 AND 24:00 ON THE DAY OF ASSESSMENT.
LABORATORY: HEMATOLOGY & BIOCHEMISTRY - RECORD THE VALUE FURTHEST FROM THE NORMAL RANGE BETWEEN 00:00 AND 24:00 ON THE DAY OF ASSESSMENT.
MEDICATION: Complete one form for each medication prescribed from the day of presentation (the start of data capture) to the day of discharge.
COMPLICATIONS: Experienced at any time from day of presentation to day of discharge / outcome.

ItemDef.Name: ever_pcr_positive
ItemDef.redcap:Calculation: if( [enrollment_e0_arm_1][pres_initial_status]='2' or [enrollment_e0_arm_1][pres_initial_status]='3' or [tier_1_week_1_arm_1][test_result]='1' or [tier_1_week_2_arm_1][test_result]='1' or [tier_1_week_3_arm_1][test_result]='1' or [tier_1_week_4_arm_1][test_result]='1' or [tier_1_week_5_arm_1][test_result]='1' or [tier_1_week_6_arm_1][test_result]='1', 1,0)

ItemDef.Name: symptom_now
ItemDef.redcap:Calculation: if([sympt_status][1] = '1' or [sympt_status][2] = '1' or [sympt_status][3] = '1' or [sympt_status][4] = '1' or [sympt_status][5] = '1' or [sympt_status][6] = '1' or [sympt_status][7] = '1' or [enrollment_e0_arm_1][pres_initial_status]='3', 1, 0 )

ItemDef.Name: current_tier
ItemDef.redcap:Calculation: if([event-name]='tier_1_week_1_arm_1' or [event-name]='tier_1_week_2_arm_1' or [event-name]='tier_1_week_3_arm_1' or [event-name]='tier_1_week_4_arm_1' or [event-name]='tier_1_week_5_arm_1' or [event-name]='tier_1_week_6_arm_1',1,if([event-name]='tier_2_week_1_arm_1' or [event-name]='tier_2_week_2_arm_1' or [event-name]='tier_2_week_3_arm_1' or [event-name]='tier_2_week_4_arm_1' or [event-name]='tier_2_week_5_arm_1' or [event-name]='tier_2_week_6_arm_1',2,if([event-name]='tier_3_week_1_arm_1' or [event-name]='tier_3_week_2_arm_1' or [event-name]='tier_3_week_3_arm_1' or [event-name]='tier_3_week_4_arm_1' or [event-name]='tier_3_week_5_arm_1' or [event-name]='tier_3_week_6_arm_1',3,1)))

ItemDef.Name: calcnext_tier
ItemDef.redcap:FieldNote: Hidden helper field used for comparisons and alerts.

ItemDef.Name: tier_review_complete
ItemDef.redcap:FieldNote: Confirms that workflow review has been completed.

Question.TranslatedText: Participant appears to be assigned to an incorrect Tier. Please review.
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: Participant appears to be assigned to an incorrect Tier. Please review.

Question.TranslatedText: Participant appears to be assigned to the correct Tier
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: Participant appears to be assigned to the correct Tier
Participant should transition to Tier [expected_tier].

ErrorMessage.TranslatedText: The value you provided is outside the suggested range (2000-01-01 - no limit). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.

ItemDef.Name: noncorona_expphi_v2
ItemDef.redcap:FieldNote: Includes suspected epidemiological or environmental exposure even without confirmed infection

Question.TranslatedText: High suspicion of exposure to hantavirus
As a research professional I certifying that consent has been documented
Did the participant consent for blood samples to be used for genetic (DNA) research?
Did the participant consent to participate in the Host Genetics substudy?
Did the patient travel outside of their home region in the past 6 Weeks?
specify all city / cities or town(s) and region(s) of travel
History of exposure or contact with suspected or confirmed human case of same pathogen?
Date of first contact with suspected or confirmed case
Date of last contact with suspected or confirmed case

ItemDef.Name: expo14_sharedcabin
ItemDef.redcap:SectionHeader: EXPOSURE TO CONFIRMED OR SUSPECTED CASE ON BOARD

Question.TranslatedText: Shared cabin with confirmed or suspected case
Shared bathroom facilities with confirmed or suspected case
Shared meals with confirmed or suspected case
Participated in social activities with confirmed or suspected case
Participated in shared shore/off-boat excursions with confirmed or suspected case
Worked or spent prolonged time in the same enclosed area as confirmed or suspected case
Any unwell household members in the 6 weeks prior to the admission of case?
Which system(s) are affected? (tick all that apply)
Which system(s) are affected? (tick all that apply)
Which system(s) are affected? (tick all that apply)
Which system(s) are affected? (tick all that apply)
Which system(s) are affected? (tick all that apply)
Which system(s) are affected? (tick all that apply)
Which system(s) are affected? (tick all that apply)
Which system(s) are affected? (tick all that apply)
Which system(s) are affected? (tick all that apply)
Have household members had any contact with a confirmed case of the same infection?

Exposure to rodent-contaminated environments before boarding the vessel (e.g. exposure in Argentina, shared visit to rubbish dump for birdwatching, contact with areas potentially contaminated by rodents)
Rodent sighting or exposure on board the vessel
Any insect or arthropod bites (eg. mosquitoes, ticks)
Other animal contact not listed above
Specify animal contacts not listed above
Patient swam or bathed in pools, ponds, or rivers
Exposure to flood water/stagnant water bodies or contaminated water
Initial clinical and PCR status at presentation
Onset date of first / earliest symptom

ErrorMessage.TranslatedText: The value you provided is outside the suggested range (no limit - today). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.
The value you provided is outside the suggested range (no limit - today). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.

Question.TranslatedText: Most recent presentation/admission date at this facility

ErrorMessage.TranslatedText: The value you provided is outside the suggested range (no limit - today). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.

Question.TranslatedText: Is the date of birth known?

Question.TranslatedText: Specify other primary location of occupation
If different from health case facility, specify the patient's region of residence.

ItemDef.Name: comor_chrcardiac
ItemDef.redcap:SectionHeader: CO-MORBIDITIES AND RISK FACTORS: Existing prior to this current illness and is ongoing

Question.TranslatedText: Is the patient on anti-retroviral therapy (ART)?
If HIV positive: CD4 count date

ErrorMessage.TranslatedText: The value you provided is outside the suggested range (no limit - today). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.

Question.TranslatedText: If HIV positive: Most recent CD4 count (cells/ÂµL)

ErrorMessage.TranslatedText: The value you provided is outside the suggested range (1 - 10000). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.
The value you provided is outside the suggested range (1 - 10000). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.

Question.TranslatedText: If HIV positive: Is HIV viral load detectable

The value you provided is outside the suggested range (1 - 5000000). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.

Question.TranslatedText: Long term or high-dose corticosteroid therapy

ItemDef.Name: sympt_dailydata
ItemDef.redcap:SectionHeader: SYMPTOMS: Indicate if experienced between 00:00 to 24:00 on day of assessment.

Question.TranslatedText: Did the patient report symptoms on this date?

ItemDef.Name: sign_dailydata
ItemDef.redcap:SectionHeader: SIGNS: Record the clinical findings observed between 00:00 and 24:00 on the day of assessment

Question.TranslatedText: Were any signs reported on this date?

ItemDef.Name: vital_dailydata
ItemDef.redcap:SectionHeader: VITAL SIGNS & ASSESSMENTS: Record the value furthest from normal range between 00:00 to 24:00 on day of assessment.

Question.TranslatedText: Enter Vital Signs data for this date?

ItemDef.Name: treat_dailydata
ItemDef.redcap:SectionHeader: TREATMENTS & INTERVENTIONS: Record all interventions given between 00:00 to 24:00 on day of assessment.

Question.TranslatedText: Enter Treatments & Interventions data for this date?
Select all blood products that were administered.
Select all blood products that were administered.
Select all blood products that were administered.
Select all blood products that were administered.
Select all blood products that were administered.
Select all blood products that were administered.
Please enter each medication on a Medication form which can be found on the Record Home Page.
Question.redcap:FormattedTranslatedText: Please enter each medication on a Medication form which can be found on the Record Home Page.

ItemDef.Name: treat_o2supp
ItemDef.redcap:SectionHeader: RESPIRATORY SUPPORT: Record all respiratory interventions given between 00:00 to 24:00 on day of assessment.

Question.TranslatedText: Extracorporeal life support therapy (ECLS) / Extracorporeal membrane oxygenation (ECMO)

Question.TranslatedText: FiO2 at time of PaO2 (select units)

ItemDef.Name: critd_critcare
ItemDef.redcap:SectionHeader: ADVANCED CARE INTERVENTIONS: Record all advanced care interventions given between 00:00 to 24:00 on day of assessment.

Question.TranslatedText: Were advanced care (including acute organ support and critical care) therapeutic interventions administered on this date?
ICU / ITU / HDU / Intermediate Care Unit admission
Renal replacement therapy (RRT) or dialysis / hemofiltration
Type of renal replacement therapy (RRT) or dialysis / hemofiltration
Other advanced care intervention(s) or procedure(s)

ItemDef.Name: sympt_status
ItemDef.redcap:Calculation: if([sympt_fever]='1' or [sympt_rigchill]='1' or [sympt_fatigue]='1' or [sympt_weak]='1' or [sympt_myalgia]='1' or [sympt_cough]='1' or [sympt_shortbreat]='1' or [sympt_abdpain]='1' or [sympt_diarrhoea]='1' or [sympt_vomit]='1' or [sympt_nausea]='1' or [sympt_urine]='1' or [sympt_polyuria]='1' or [sympt_haemorrhag]='1' or [sympt_haemorrhag_sev]='1' or [sympt_hazyvision]='1' or [sympt_seizconv]='1' or [sympt_confusion]='1' or [sign_hypotherm]='1' or [sign_lowurine]='1' or [sign_respdistress]='1' or [sign_tachypnoea]='1' or [sign_tachycardia]='1' or [sign_ascites]='1' or [sign_jaund]='1' or [sign_anaemia]='1' or [sign_cogimpair]='1' or [sign_agitation]='1' or [treat_fluid_parent]='1' or [treat_o2supp]='1' or [treat_prone]='1' or [critd_critcare]='1' or [asses_lvlcare]='3' or [asses_lvlcare]='4' or [asses_lvlcare]='5',1,0)

ItemDef.Name: labs_date
ItemDef.redcap:SectionHeader: LABORATORY: HEMATOLOGY & BIOCHEMISTRY - RECORD THE VALUE FURTHEST FROM THE NORMAL RANGE BETWEEN 00:00 AND 24:00 ON THE DAY OF ASSESSMENT.

Question.TranslatedText: Was RT-qPCR performed on venous blood?
Was RT-qPCR performed on nasopharyngeal swab?
Was virus genome sequencing was ordered/performed?

ErrorMessage.TranslatedText: The value you provided is outside the suggested range (no limit - today). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.

Question.TranslatedText: Was RT-qPCR performed on venous blood?
Was RT-qPCR performed on nasopharyngeal swab?
Was virus genome sequencing was ordered/performed?

ItemDef.Name: medi_medtype
ItemDef.redcap:SectionHeader: MEDICATION: Complete one form for each medication prescribed from the day of presentation (the start of data capture) to the day of discharge.

Question.TranslatedText: Select agents administered while hospitalised or at discharge (one form per medication)
Select other agents administered while hospitalised or at discharge
Specify other agents administered while hospitalised or at discharge
Is this medication treating the disease?
Specify other type of intravenous immunoglobulin

ItemDef.Name: medi_route
ItemDef.redcap:BranchingLogic: [medi_medtype]='8' or [medi_medtype]='10' or [medi_medtype]='3' or [medi_medtype]='1' or [medi_medtype]='7' or [medi_medtype]='13' or [medi_medtype_otherl2]='8' or [medi_medtype_otherl2]='10' or [medi_medtype_otherl2]='3' or [medi_medtype_otherl2]='1' or [medi_medtype_otherl2]='7' or [medi_medtype_otherl2]='13'

ErrorMessage.TranslatedText: The value you provided is outside the suggested range (no limit - today). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.
The value you provided is outside the suggested range (no limit - today). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.

Question.TranslatedText: Total number of days treatment given

ErrorMessage.TranslatedText: The value you provided is outside the suggested range (0 - no limit). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.
The value you provided is outside the suggested range (0 - no limit). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.

Question.TranslatedText: Was this an off-label or compassionate use of the medication?
Specify the off-label or compassionate use medication

ItemDef.Name: compl_data
ItemDef.redcap:SectionHeader: COMPLICATIONS: Experienced at any time from day of presentation to day of discharge / outcome.

Question.TranslatedText: Were any complications reported from the day of presentation to the day of discharge/outcome?
Date of stroke / cerebrovascular accident onset
Date of congestive heart failure onset
Date of cryptogenic organising pneumonia (COP) onset
Date of acute respiratory distress syndrome (ARDS) onset
Date of deep vein thrombosis (DVT) onset

ErrorMessage.TranslatedText: The value you provided is outside the suggested range (no limit - today). This value is admissible, but you may wish to double check it.

Question.TranslatedText: Ability to self-care at discharge versus before illness
If discharged alive: Oxygen therapy post-discharge treatment
If discharged alive or still hospitalised: Ongoing health care needs relating to this admission for pathogen of interest
If discharged alive or still hospitalised: Ongoing health care needs NOT related to pathogen episode

If Still hospitalised or transfer to other facility: Medically fit for discharge (pathogen resolved) but remains in hospital for other reason (e.g. awaiting alternate care, resident in long term health care or mental health facility)
If transfer to other facility: is the transfer facility a study site?
What is the Participant Identification Number at the new facility?

CodeList.redcap:CheckboxChoices: 4, 0.9% Sodium Chloride (Normal Saline) | 7, Albumin | 17, Hartmann's Solution / Ringer's Lactate | 88, Other

Decode.TranslatedText: 0.18%-0.3% Sodium Chloride + 4% Glucose (Hypotonic saline with dextrose)
0.45% normal saline + 4% Glucose (Half-normal saline with dextrose)

CodeList.Name: treat_blood_type___1

Decode.TranslatedText: Dopamine < 5ug/kg/min OR dobutamine OR milrinone OR levosimendan
Dopamine 5-15ug/kg/min OR epinephrine(adrenaline) / norepinephrine(noradrenaline) <=0.1ug/kg/min OR vasopressin OR phenylephrine

Decode.TranslatedText: Enhanced prophylaxis for infection with pathogen of interest
Avian influenza A H7N9/ H5N1/ H5N8/ H7N7
